ddls:
CREATE TABLE "businesses" (
  "business_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each business */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the business */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category to which the business belongs */,
  "address" TEXT /* Street address of the business */,
  "cross_street" TEXT /* Cross street or nearby landmark */,
  "lat" REAL /* Latitude coordinate of the business location */,
  "lng" REAL /* Longitude coordinate of the business location */,
  "labeled_latlngs" TEXT /* JSON string containing labeled coordinates (e.g., display, entrance) */,
  "distance" INTEGER /* Distance from a reference point (e.g., central location) */,
  "postal_code" INTEGER /* Postal code of the business location */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* Country code */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the business is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State or province where the business is located */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the business is located */,
  "formatted_address" TEXT /* Formatted address of the business */,
  "neighborhood" TEXT /* Neighborhood or area where the business is located */,
  "external_id" TEXT /* External ID for the business (e.g., from a third-party service) */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average user rating */,
  "review_count" INTEGER /* Number of user reviews */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Annual revenue */,
  "employee_count" INTEGER /* Number of employees */,
  "established_date" TEXT /* Date the business was established */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Business phone number */,
  "email" TEXT /* Business email */,
  "website" TEXT /* Business website URL */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* JSON string containing links to social media profiles */,
  "operating_hours" TEXT /* JSON string containing operating hours */,
  "amenities" TEXT /* JSON string containing amenities (e.g., Wi-Fi, parking) */,
  "distance_to_central_location" REAL /* Distance from a central location */,
  "nearby_landmarks" TEXT /* JSON string containing nearby landmarks */,
  "is_closed" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the business is closed */,
  "is_featured" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the business is featured */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("business_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_businesses_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category */,
  "icon_url" TEXT /* URL to the category icon */,
  "description_long" TEXT /* Long description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "business_id" INTEGER /* ID of the business being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the business listing */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the business listing was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access (in seconds) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_business_id FOREIGN KEY ("business_id") REFERENCES businesses ("business_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "business_id" INTEGER /* ID of the business being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (1-5) */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was written */,
  "is_flagged" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the review is flagged */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES access_logs ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_business_id FOREIGN KEY ("business_id") REFERENCES businesses ("business_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
